input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.9.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.9.2.1
            TITLE: no fluid leakage of any type when the vehicle is tilted to a 45° angle to the horizontal

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.9.2.1: No fluid leakage of any type when the vehicle is tilted to a 45° angle to the horizontal
IN.9.2.1 No fluid leakage of any type when the vehicle is tilted to a 45° angle to the horizontal

final_answer: No fluid leakage of any type when the vehicle is tilted to a 45° angle to the horizontal
